chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-616 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on M.A. No.2516/2026. 3. For orders on M.A. No.2517/2026. 4. For hearing of main case. 08.04.2026 Barrister Jawad Ahmed Qureshi, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. == 2. Exemption granted. 1,3&4. The petitioner was interviewed by the Sindh Public Service Commission for the post of Private Secretary (BPS-17) however, he was not successful. By this petition, he has challenged the entire testing process held by the Commission. At the same time, the petitioner has also preferred an appeal under Regulation 161 of the Sindh Public Service Commission (Recruitment Management) Regulations, 2023 which is said to be pending before the Appellate Committee of the Commission. Therefore, at this point, the petitioner has yet to exhaust the alternate remedy available to him. For this reason, we are not inclined to examine the grounds urged by the petitioner lest our observations influence the Appellate Committee. The learned Additional Advocate General Sindh, who is present in other matters, is called for assistance. He too endorses the foregoing. Therefore, we dispose of this petition by directing the Appellate Committee of the Sindh Public Service Commission to decide the petitioner’s appeal under Regulation 161 within thirty days. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish
